body_txt: Much like how Dean Bitterman is the principal equivalent of Sadist Teacher , the Evil Principal is one step up from an Evil Teacher . Whereas the Dean Bitterman is merely a crusty, fun-hating bully, the Evil Principal is an outright villain who sets places on fire, murders students and jaywalks when no one is looking . While they can overlap, the Evil Principal has to actually commit crimes or mastermind an Evil Plan of some kind to qualify. The Evil Principal also sometimes isn't as obviously antagonistic as the Dean Bitterman and is often well-liked and seemingly nice . But behind the scenes, they get into all kinds of evil, secretly plotting robberies, assassinations, deals with shady organizations or even things like student rape or torture. They are most likely to appear in stories where the protagonists are school-aged children and teens in an Adults Are Useless situation taken up a level where the adult is genuinely malevolent. Whenever there's a School for Scheming or Academy of Evil , expect to see this character in charge. Contrast Reasonable Authority Figure and Putting the "Pal" in Principal .
